{{Extend "layout"}} {{Block "title"}}{{"节点列表"|$.T}}{{/Block}} {{Block "breadcrumb"}} {{Super}}
  • {{"节点列表"|$.T}}
    • {{/Block}} {{Block "main"}}
    {{"删除选中"|$.T}} {{`添加节点`|$.T}}

    {{"节点列表"|$.T}}

    {{- range $k, $v := $.Stored.listData -}} {{- end -}}
    		{{`Hostname`|$.T}} {{`Info`|$.T}} {{`Labels`|$.T}} {{`Resources`|$.T}} {{`Manager`|$.T}} {{`时间`|$.T}} {{`操作`|$.T}}
    		{{$v.Description.Hostname}}
    Engine: {{$v.Description.Engine.EngineVersion}} ({{$v.Description.Platform.OS}}/{{$v.Description.Platform.Architecture}})     		Role: {{$v.Spec.Role}}
    Availability: {{$v.Spec.Availability}}
    State: {{$v.Status.State}}
    Addr: {{$v.Status.Addr}}     		{{range $kk,$vv:=$v.Spec.Labels}}{{$kk}}:{{$vv}}
    {{end}}    		 CPU: {{Math "div" $v.Description.Resources.NanoCPUs 1000000000}}
    Memory: {{FormatBytes $v.Description.Resources.MemoryBytes 2 true}}     		{{if $v.ManagerStatus}} {{if $v.ManagerStatus.Leader}}Leader
    {{end}} {{$v.ManagerStatus.Addr}}
    ({{$v.ManagerStatus.Reachability}}) {{end}}     		{{`创建`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{`更新`|$.T}}: {{$v.CreatedAt.Local.Format "2006-01-02 15:04:05"}}
    {{$.Stored.pagination.Render}}
    {{/Block}} {{Block "footer"}} {{/Block}}
